'''Gungan Society''' was the civil government of the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]]. It was formed after the [[War of the Gungan tribes]], when [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Gallo/Legends|Gallo]] defeated Boss [[Rogoe/Legends|Rogoe]]. It largely remained isolationist after the [[Grizmallt/Legends|Grizmalltian]] Settlers colonized [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. Around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the society opened up to the rest of the galaxy and had their first [[Junior Representative/Legends|representative]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]], they worked closely but secretly with the [[Royal House of Naboo/Legends|Royal House]] and the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|people]] in opposing the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The society was divided into communities and its military was the [[Gungan Grand Army/Legends|Gungan Grand Army]].
